description: Defines mandatory logging sources and their validation rules for ISO 27001 A.8.15/A.8.16/A.8.17

cloudtrail.description: AWS CloudTrail must be enabled with multi-region trail and log file validation

vpc_flow_logs.description: VPC Flow Logs must be enabled on all VPCs

s3_access_logging.description: S3 access logging must be enabled on sensitive buckets

elb_access_logs.description: ELB access logs must be enabled on all load balancers

rds_audit_logging.description: RDS audit logging must be enabled on all database instances

cloudwatch_log_groups.description: CloudWatch log groups must exist for key services and have recent activity

lambda_logging.description: All Lambda functions must have CloudWatch log groups

guardduty.description: GuardDuty must be enabled and active

config_recorder.description: AWS Config recorder must be running
